title: YOUTH PROGRAMS - 211info
text: LA PINE PARKS AND RECREATION YOUTH PROGRAMS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a number of activities for youth throughout the year including: Sports programs, after-school programs, and summer day camps. 16405 First Street La Pine, OR 97739 Eligibility: Ages 6-14 Hours: Monday-Thursday 10am-2pm Email (541) 536-2223 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 536-2223 Main phone Main phone (541) 536-2223 Contact (541) 385-9458 Shannon Palmer [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service, financial assistance available DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Cities of La Pine, Sunriver, and Three Rivers Services: Camps Recreation Centers Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - ADULT PROGRAMS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
